claim_bullets.bullet_text: The rulebook is divided into three main sections: Player’s Section, Game Master’s Section, and Optional Rules (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-3) (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.4-4)

source_record_text: This is a summary of the 'Welcome to Sword World' section from the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, introducing the setting and core concepts of the game.
